name: Carrières d'Arvel
description: Silicate limestone extraction, railway ballast production, sand and gravel for asphalt. Route du Pied-des-Monts 3, 1844 Villeneuve. Operating since 1905. National interest site.

name: Ronchi Graviers - La Ballastière
description: Gravel extraction, stone material treatment, distribution and recycling. La Ballastière, Route de Nyon 48, 1196 Gland. Operating since early 20th century. Rail-connected facility. Part of Perrin Groupe.

name: Sagrave - Gravière de l'Isle
description: Lake and river gravel extraction, sand, all-purpose aggregates. Route des Mousses 16, 1148 L'Isle. Part of Sagrave Group.

name: Sagrave Dépôt Ouchy
description: Lakefront material distribution depot on Lausanne waterfront, Avenue de Rhodanie 13, aggregates and construction materials. Direct lake access for barge transport.

name: Sagrave Dépôt Pichettaz
description: Lakefront distribution depot, gravel and construction materials. Lake access point.

name: Sagrave Dépôt Eau-Froide
description: Material distribution depot near Villeneuve/Noville, Route des Saviez, aggregates. Lakefront location.

name: Sagrave Dépôt Le Bouveret
description: Lakefront depot at eastern end of lake, material distribution.

name: GCM - Gravière de la Claie-aux-Moines
description: Major gravel extraction and concrete production facility. Chemin de Geffry 2, 1073 Savigny. Important regional producer.

name: Gravière des Mossières
description: Gravel extraction site in interior region, Unnamed Road, 1145 Bière, construction aggregates.

name: JPF Gravières
description: Multiple gravel and rock extraction sites, natural aggregates for concrete and asphalt.

name: PQR Béton SA - La Ballastière
description: Concrete production facility at La Ballastière site, Route de Nyon 48, 1196 Gland. Part of Perrin Groupe. Features Neustark CO2 storage system (300+ tonnes/year capacity). Produces Recystark recycled concrete.

name: Scierie Zahnd
description: Major sawmill in Vaud canton, Chemin De Forchy 10, 1046 Rueyres. Spruce/fir timber from local forests, Enerbois biomass energy facility.

name: La Forestière - Headquarters
description: Major forestry cooperative, Route de la Chocolatière, 1026 Echandens. Commercialization of local timber from Vaud forests.

name: Geneva Lake Extraction Zone
description: Historical and current lake gravel extraction from delta deposits, dredging operations. Multiple zones along lake.

name: Janine Sigrist Atelier
description: Artisanal ceramic workshop, hand-thrown stoneware and porcelain using local and regional clays.

name: Argile et Création
description: Ceramic workshop and clay material supplier, Chemin Albert-Louis Chappuis 5, 1085 Vulliens. Pottery courses and artisan production.

name: GAM Fonderie
description: Artisanal art foundry, Chemin de la Condémine 7, 1315 La Sarraz. Bronze and aluminum casting, architectural elements, restoration work.

name: Claude Merkli Soufflage de Verre
description: Glass blowing workshop since 1988, Chemin de Savoie 10, 1026 Echandens. Borosilicate glass artisan production, decorative and functional glassware.

name: Valérie de Roquemaurel
description: European glassmaker, Chemin de Clon 24, 1405 Pomy. Artistic glass blowing, trained in Murano, decorative glass art pieces.

name: Ralph Kastl Souffleur de Verre
description: Artisanal blown glass workshop, Chemin de la Viane 105, 1052 Le Mont-sur-Lausanne. Decorative glassware and custom pieces.

name: Retripa - Centre Crissier
description: Major sorting and recycling facility. Chemin de Mongevon 11, 1023 Crissier. Processes 120,000 tonnes/year paper/cardboard, 12,000 tonnes/year metals, 2,500 tonnes/year plastics, 20,000 tonnes/year glass. Main Vaud hub. Operating since 1956. ISO certified.

name: Retripa - Aclens Depot
description: Material distribution depot and transfer station. Chemin du Coteau 35. Part of Retripa network.

name: Retripa Massongex - Wood Recycling
description: Largest wood recycling platform in Romandie, inaugurated September 2024. Route Des Ilettes 33, 1869 Massongex. Processes 40,000 tonnes/year wood from demolition, pallets, furniture. Produces chipboard particles and biomass energy. 5M CHF investment. Advanced dust collection system.

name: Compostière du Gros-de-Vaud
description: Treats 10,000 tonnes/year organic waste from 25+ communes (Cugy, Echallens, Morrens, etc.). Route de Boussens 21, 1042 Bettens. Produces compost, vegetable soil, wood chips. Operating since 2004. 15+ years experience.

name: Compostière de la Rochette
description: Organic waste treatment and valorization, Le Riondi, 1041 Bottens. Compost and vegetable soil production for agriculture and landscaping. Operated by Ernest Tzaut & Fils SA.

name: BGS Compost
description: Treats organic waste from Lake Geneva basin. Route des Mortiers, 1271 Givrins. Member of Biomasse Suisse. Produces bio-certified compost meeting Swiss organic agriculture requirements. Operating since 1996. 5 agricultural/landscaping partners.

name: La Compostière La Coulette
description: Organic waste treatment facility, Route de la Cérèce 5, 1092 Belmont-sur-Lausanne. Serving Lausanne-area communes (Paudex, Pully, Lutry, Savigny, Bourg-en-Lavaux, Belmont) since 1994. Compost and vegetable soil products. Open Monday-Saturday 7h-17h45.

name: Trans-EcoBroyage
description: Grinding and processing of green waste, tree trunks. Wood chips (BRF), vegetable soil and topsoil production and delivery. Minimum 0.5m3 orders.

name: SADEC - Côte Vaudoise
description: Waste management for Côte vaudoise region, paper and cardboard collection and coordination. En Vertelin 3, 1196 Gland. Administrative office. Sends materials to Swiss-German paper mills. Services multiple lakeside communes.

name: Perlen Papier (External Destination)
description: Switzerland's largest paper recycler processing 500,000 tonnes/year waste paper. PM7 machine produces 360,000 tonnes/year newsprint. Vaud's collected paper/cardboard is sent here for processing. Operating since 1800s, PM7 since 2010.

name: GESA - Gravières d'Epeisses
description: Major gravel extraction and processing facility. Route de Satigny 30, 1214 Vernier (main site). Processes 600,000 tonnes/year graviers, bétons, grave routière. Uses AI for flow optimization. Rail-connected. Secondary site: Chemin des Coquelicots 16. Operating 30+ years. Water recycling, eco-concrete production.

name: Retripa - Centre Vernier
description: Geneva canton recycling facility. Chemin de l'Emeraude 5, 1214 Vernier. Part of Retripa network. Sorting and valorization of multiple waste streams. Operating since 1991. ISO certified.

name: SRREC - Société Romande de Recyclage
description: Construction demolition waste recycling facility. Route du Bois-de-Bay 115, 1242 Satigny. Joint venture Holcim-Implenia since 2007. Processes 65,000 tonnes/year demolition materials into classified recycled aggregates, sand, gravel. Supplies Geneva market with recycled concrete materials. Advanced processing plant.

name: Sortera - Ecopôle
description: First automated high-performance sorting center in Switzerland. Route du Bois-de-Bay, 1242 Satigny (Zone Industrielle du Bois-de-Bay). Opened 2019. Processes 70,000+ tonnes/year industrial/construction waste. 80% sorting rate (vs 30% previously), 70%+ valorization rate. Robotic sorting, rail-connected. Linked to Sogetri La Praille pre-sorting site (55,000 tonnes/year) via rail.

name: RVM - Recycling Valorisation de Matières
description: Waste treatment installation. Route de Satigny 52A, 1242 Satigny. Founded 1987. Collection and recycling services for institutions, industries, craftsmen. Member Recycleurs de Genève. Certified waste treatment facility.

name: Pro Béton - La Praille
description: Ready-mix concrete production. Route des Jeunes 99, 1227 Carouge (near La Praille). 40 years serving Geneva construction. Produces standard, special, recycled, and low-carbon concrete. Transport and pumping services. Certified SN EN 206.

name: Pro Béton - Vernier
description: Ready-mix concrete production facility. Route de Vernier 130, 1214 Vernier. Part of Pro Béton network. 40 years Geneva market experience. Standard and special concrete production.

name: Holcim Geneva Market
description: Geneva market operations using SRREC recycled aggregates. Route de Vernier 140, 1214 Vernier. Supplies recycled concrete (Recybéton) to major projects including Quartier des Vergers, Alto Pont-Rouge. Partner in circular economy initiatives.
